original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Riley, Benjamin, Jacob, and Ethan. Riley told you that Jacob is a knave if and only if Benjamin is a knave. Benjamin was heard saying, "Jacob is not a knave". Jacob remarked, "Jacob is a knight or Riley is a knight". Ethan asserted: "Ethan is a knight or Benjamin is a knight". So who is a knight and who is a knave?
